title: CIA Historian: “Aliens Are Controlling Human Timelines!” (ft. Peter Levenda)
summary: Peter Levenda discusses the interconnections between UFO phenomena, the JFK assassination, and occult practices among American intelligence operatives and elites. He explores how figures like E. Howard Hunt, Guy Banister, and Fred Crisman connect the 1947 Maury Island UFO incident to the Kennedy assassination, while also detailing the mysterious 'Council of Nine' seances involving American aristocracy and their unexpected link to Lee Harvey Oswald through Ruth Paine.

acronyms.definition: An organization for former intelligence community members
The forerunner of the CIA during World War II
US domestic intelligence and security service
Psychic abilities to perceive information beyond normal senses

events.description: Kenneth Arnold UFO sighting and Maury Island incident in the Pacific Northwest
The Council of Nine seance held in Maine on New Year's Eve with American elites including Arthur Young and Ruth Forbes Paine Young
JFK assassination with connections to Guy Banister, David Ferrie, and others in New Orleans
Guy Banister died before Garrison could interview him
American Orthodox Catholic Church legally incorporated in New York
Robert Kennedy assassination and funeral at St. Patrick's Cathedral

key_claims.claim: E. Howard Hunt wrote at least three occult novels that attacked the Kennedys as Satan worshippers
E. Howard Hunt on his deathbed claimed there was a conspiracy to kill Kennedy that he knew about and that CIA was somehow involved
Douglas Caddy claimed E. Howard Hunt told him JFK was assassinated over the alien presence
Guy Banister's job in the FBI was reporting on UFO sightings back to Hoover using special X-Files designations
Fred Crisman from the 1947 Maury Island UFO incident was later investigated by Jim Garrison for the JFK assassination
Two Air Force intelligence officers died when their plane exploded after collecting UFO slag from the Maury Island incident - the first UFO-related fatalities
Ruth Paine, who housed Lee Harvey Oswald and got him the job at the Texas School Book Depository, was the daughter-in-law of Arthur Young who participated in the Council of Nine seances
Allen Dulles deliberately stopped Ruth Paine's testimony in the Warren Commission when she was about to mention visiting Arthur Young and Ruth Forbes Paine Young
The American Orthodox Catholic Church was an intelligence front with mostly clergy and no parishioners
The Council of Nine seance participants later claimed to be in contact with entities from a UFO in low earth orbit, the same ones later contacted by Uri Geller
